R1: executed_by(tree, 'scan customer against database', 'system') and exists(tree, 'scan customer against database')
R2: exists(tree, 'scan customer against database') and receive_exist(tree, 'identityCheckHistory')

R3: data_leads_to_absence(tree, 'accountBalance <= 0 and customerType != "VIP"', 'End Activity') or condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'accountBalance <= 0 and customerType != "VIP"', 'approve overdraft')
